[pattern] [warning] monorepo-integration-tests is a residual two-file zone with zero cohesion and zero coupling — identical in structure to the previously dissolved web-unit and logo zones; pinning both files to the e2e zone would consolidate all cross-package test infrastructure under a single well-named zone.
[relationship] [info] scheduler-startup.test.js exercises the web-server startup path while cross-package-contracts.test.js validates inter-package APIs; placing them in a common residual zone obscures that they test different architectural tiers and should be reviewed separately.

[suggestion] [info] Establish a policy that all integration tests are explicitly pinned to named zones at creation time rather than relying on algorithmic community detection. Integration tests will always form residual zones because they are structurally cross-cutting. A documented pin policy would prevent this recurring misclassification pattern from appearing after every analysis pass.
